title.en: The Lord of Flame Zero resides here, and a huge...

content.en:
The Sea of Dimensions, a treasure land not too far from the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth-Yan Yu Ling.

The Lord of Flame Zero resides here, and a huge palace has been built here.

Usually, he practices here.

Suddenly.

The Lord of Flame Zero felt shivering all over, as if a great crisis had descended.

"What's going on?"

The Lord of Flame Zero is a little unsure.

Bang!!!!

A terrifying aura descended from afar.

Suddenly, the entire Yan Yu Collar seemed to be shattered.

Swish!

The Lord of Flame Zero immediately decided to flee.

However, before he could run away, the man came to him.

"Seniors spare their lives!"

The Lord of Flame Zero directly confessed.

He was very puzzled at the moment, he didn't know Ye Tian, and he hadn't had a conflict with Ye Tian, why did this person come to kill him?

"You're the Lord of Flame Zero?"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes!" the Lord of Flame Zero nodded, "Senior, is there any misunderstanding between us?"

"No misunderstanding, you should know the Lord of the Heavenly Vine, I once came to your Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth and obtained the inheritance of the Lord of the Heavenly Vine, and to accept the inheritance, you need to make an ultimate oath, and the ultimate oath of the Lord of the Heavenly Vine is to kill you. Ye Tian said.

“......"

The Lord of Flame Zero was desperate, but he didn't expect that the real cause was because of the Lord of the Heavenly Vine.

Such a weak existence as the Lord of the Heavenly Vine can still bring him a life crisis now, and no one would have imagined that there would be a big man who would descend to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth and obtain the inheritance of the Lord of the Heavenly Vine.

He's so unlucky!

"If you had known that you would have found out the inheritance place of the Lord of the Heavenly Vine and destroyed it, there would be no today!"

The Lord of Flame Zero was extremely remorseful.

"Spare my life, I'm willing to give up all my net worth. The Lord of Flame Zero said.

"No matter how many treasures you take, it's useless!" Ye Tian shook his head, "I'm going to break the Ultimate Oath, and the price I pay is far more than your net worth." "

Seeing that begging for mercy was useless, the Lord of Flame Zero burned the origin and broke out an escape-type ultimate dimensional killing move in an attempt to escape.

His strength is not weak, he has mastered the five ultimate dimensional killing moves, and the ultimate body of the divine dimension is also extremely powerful, and he has also cultivated the ultimate system of the super dimensional realm, comprehended the rules of the supreme dimension, and the realm is not low.

However, it was Ye Tian who he encountered.

Rumble!

Ye Tian patted lightly, directly smashing the body of the Flame Zero Lord who was escaping, and the Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move of the Extreme Dimension even wiped out his ultimate will, completely erasing all traces of it.

After killing the Lord of Flame Zero, the ultimate oath in the underworld was shattered, and it no longer affected Ye Tian.

After that, Ye Tian left here.

After a long time.

A supreme lord of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth came here, and only found the body fragments of the Lord of Flame Zero, and then he knew that the Lord of Flame Zero had fallen.

Especially the Ultimate Lords of the same ultimate force as the Lord of Flame Zero, they only felt sorry, but they didn't dare to be angry, they were afraid that Ye Tian would wipe them out as well.

......

Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

Ye Tian went everywhere to collect resources, and he already knew the way to leave, so he didn't have to worry about finding resources and not being able to take them out.

One of his replica bodies explores, even if he encounters danger, with his current strength, it is not easy to fall, unless he is really too curious about some dangerous forbidden areas, this will fall.

He had to admit that there were indeed a lot of treasure resources in the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, but it was not easy to obtain them.

He was able to obtain so many resources, completely copying his body, and he was not afraid of sacrifice, and he was the existence of other Nine Realms peaks, so he didn't dare to do this at all.

And as he continued to explore, he learned more and more about the Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a deep abyss, he didn't know much about this place, but he could feel the danger here.

And there was a terrifying suction here, if he continued to get closer, he would be sucked in, and it would be difficult to get out.

"Would you like to go in and have a look?"

Ye Tian was thinking about this question, if it was really extremely terrifying, it would endanger other replica bodies, and he could completely dismantle this replica body at the first time, unless it was too late.

But it shouldn't be so scary.

He pondered for a long time, but finally decided to go in and have a look.

Wow!

He flew in, and then a suction force came, as if a terrifying force turned into a big hand and dragged him directly in.

......

Black!

Extreme darkness!

When Ye Tian entered here, his ultimate will was suppressed, and he couldn't perceive much distance at all.

Suddenly..

A voice came.

The voice was full of madness and indifference.

"Are there other powerhouses?"

Ye Tian's copy body tried to extend, but it was also suppressed, and he flew over with the sound, only then did he sense the existence of the other party.

Yuan Xu!

This is the name of the other party.

"Hello Your Excellency, may I ask what kind of place is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Yuan Xu Realm Lord was a little surprised, "You just came here, you didn't embark on the Eternal Night Ultimate System, you were able to sense my existence, it seems that your strength is extremely strong." But alas, you can't get out. "

"Can't get out? Why is this?" Ye Tian asked.

"Because if you want to go out, you must at least have the strength of the Ultimate Realm Lord, the key is that this is the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, and you can't impact the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm here. Therefore, we can't break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, so naturally we can't get out. Of course, unless you are a doppelganger, and the ontology is still in the outside world, you can directly give up the doppelganger. The Yuan Xu Realm Lord said.

"I see. "

Ye Tian understood.

"You're not desperate?" asked Yuan Xu, puzzled.

"Why do you want to be desperate, I'm a clone!" Ye Tian said.

"Damn, damn it, why are you a clone!"

The Yuan Xu Realm Lord went crazy and attacked Ye Tian desperately.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian and his gang killed, and they found that the other party's strength was extremely terrifying.

The other party should have walked the Eternal Night 1.5 Ultimate System, comprehended the Eternal Night Ultimate Rules, and the realm was even higher than him, at least reaching the Sevenfold Ultimate Rules.

But the other party's physical strength is not high, not as good as him, but the speed is too fast, at least five times faster than his speed.

Obviously, the strength of the Eternal Night Ultimate system is speed, and perhaps there are other aspects.

In short, Ye Tian was completely crushed by his death, but it was difficult for the other party to defeat him.

After fighting for a long time, the Yuan Xu Realm Lord calmed down.

"I'm sorry, I've been stuck here for countless years, so something went wrong. The Yuan Xu Realm Lord said.

Problem?

It's not that he was trapped, but seeing that he wasn't trapped, he became angry and murderous.

But Ye Tian didn't bother to bother with it, after all, what's the point of talking to a madman.
